title: The Beginning And Heaven
description: Travel to new frontiers with The Beginning and Heaven: explore the Beginning dimension, the origin of everything, and the majestic Heaven, full of secrets and challenges.
body:
This mod requires Geckolib to work and it is recommended to use JEI for a better experience.
If you wish to support me you can leave me a donation at: https://ko-fi.com/imVarali Thank you very much <3

Discord Oficial:
https://discord.gg/YVQ5jpNehh
For more information, the link to the wikis are as follows: 
English: https://the-beginning-and-heaven.fandom.com/wiki/The_beginning_and_Heaven_Wiki
Spanish: https://the-beginning-and-heaven.fandom.com/es/wiki/Wiki_The_beginning_and_Heaven

The mod is translated into English and Spanish

The mod has an effect with bright lights that can be uncomfortable, play in a well lit space.

![The Beginning And Heaven](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff2d871d3153686098ed0058d7a1e5d374f04d65_0.webp)

The Beginning and heaven is a mod that focuses on the integration of two new dimensions, heaven is the counterpart of the nether, and the beginning is the counterpart of the end. Apart from the dimensions the mod modifies and adds several things to minecraft vanilla for a better integration with the mod like modification in the crafting and new structures in the overworld, in the nether and the end.

The Sky: characterized by its islands and floating structures, to enter the dimension you will need to make a nether portal using the compact cloud as a frame and the light as a lighter. It features new work tables where you can craft new rings, bows and shields, each with a designated villager.

The beginning; a desolate dimension, inhabited by inerman (representation of an enderman before being corrupted), in this one you won't find much. A boss, the creator of everything you know, Iner Angel. The way to enter the dimension is through the dark fortress, in the center will be the portal whose activation is with the original star.



If you find a mistake or have any recommendation you can leave it in comments, I'll read them <3
